image:image.image:title: Celeste Luxe — Luksuzno ulje za kosu
image:image.image:caption: Model sa sjajnom, zdravom kosom nakon primene Celeste Luxe ulja.

image:image.image:title: Celeste Luxe Hair Oil — bočica 50ml
image:image.image:caption: Luksuzno ulje od 9 hladno ceđenih prirodnih ulja, 50 ml.

image:image.image:title: Celeste Luxe — sastojci
image:image.image:caption: Amla, karanfilić, ruzmarin, bademovo, ricinus, avokado, argan, slačica, jojoba i semenke grožđa.

image:image.image:title: Celeste Luxe — tekstura ulja
image:image.image:caption: Zlatna, bistra tečnost koja se upija trenutno.
